message:
fix: sanitize javascript:/vbscript:/data: URLs in markdown links, escape unknown roles, and use transfer_timeout for SFTP TCP read/write

Bug 1a: render_content() now intercepts Tag::Link events and replaces
javascript:, vbscript:, and data: URL schemes with "#" (case-insensitive).

Bug 1b: format_role_display() now applies html_escape() to unknown role
strings in the fallback branch.

Bug 2: SFTP sync_path_sftp() now uses self.transfer_timeout (not
self.connection_timeout) for TCP read/write timeouts, and logs failures
via tracing::warn instead of silently discarding with `let _ =`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
